name: Merry-Go-Round Transportation
registry_source: NJ DOE School Bus Vendor List (contractor code 2498, county 13/Essex); Manta/HubBiz business listing
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER NAME and keyword searches (MERRY-GO-ROUND TRANSPORTATION, MERRY GO ROUND, MERRY*) returned no NJ school-bus carriers — only MERRY HEART PERSONNEL CORP (Succasunna) and MERRYFIELD & SONS (Mount Ephraim), both unrelated. Confirmed NJ DOE school bus contractor (code 2498) under Essex County (13). Located at 124 Little Falls Rd Ste 15, Fairfield, NJ 07004; phone (973) 882-8117. ~10 employees, ~$728K revenue. NJ Treasury entity search behind portal; could not retrieve formal inc_date/officers — 1995 founding date is from third-party business directory (Manta).

name: Kids To & From School
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER NAME search (KIDS TO AND FROM SCHOOL) and keyword search (KIDS TO*) returned no NJ matches — only KIDS TOGETHER INC (Oviedo, FL, USDOT 2534839), unrelated. Not found in NJ DOE School Bus Vendor List under that exact name; many similarly named NJ carriers exist (e.g., 'Jersey Kids Transportation', 'Kids Cab', 'Kids Are Great', 'Kids Transportation', 'Kids Choice INC', 'Kids Empire Trans', 'We The Kids Transportation', 'Sunshine Kids Transportation LLC', 'Ventura Kids Transportation, LLC') — possible the source name is a colloquial/DBA. No HQ/address provided in input. NJ Treasury entity portal could not be searched programmatically; no bizapedia/opencorporates results.

name: JD Padilla School Bus LLC
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate; NM school bus contractors are state-permitted via NMPED). FMCSA SAFER NAME (JD PADILLA SCHOOL BUS, J D PADILLA, PADILLA SCHOOL BUS) and keyword searches returned no school-bus carriers in NM — only PADILLA LOGGING (Abiquiu), PADILLA LOGGING RESTORATION LLC (Abiquiu), PADILLA TRUCKING (Albuquerque/Hernandez), PADILLA SEPTIC (Albuquerque), PADILLA INDUSTRIES INC (Santa Fe), PADILLA'S PORTABLE RESTROOMS (Farmington) — all unrelated. NOT listed in NMPED School Bus Contractor List (4/23/2020) under Quemado district; that district instead shows B & U Inc. (Mike Candelaria), Crystal Leyba, and Walraven Buses LLC. NM SoS entity portal could not be searched programmatically; bizapedia listing exists but is behind a security check.

name: Council School Bus Corp
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER NAME and keyword searches (COUNCIL SCHOOL BUS, COUNCIL SCHOOL, COUNCIL*) returned zero MS matches. Address 3543 Old Brandon Rd, Jackson, MS 39208 actually lies in the Pearl/Rankin County area (ZIP 39208). Not listed in 2021-2022 MS School District Pupil Transportation Directory (Jackson/Pearl entries only show district transportation directors, not Council). MS SoS business search portal currently returns 'corpsearch is not configured' error and could not be queried programmatically. OpenCorporates and Bizapedia results behind CAPTCHA/security checks.

name: Voges Services Inc
registry_source: D&B / Yellow Pages / EZLocal / Yelp business listings (active, est. 1984)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER NAME (VOGES SERVICES, VOGES) and keyword searches returned only VOGES FARMS (Evansville, IL, USDOT 1765161) — unrelated trucking, not the school bus operator. Voges Services Inc operating as a school bus contractor in Coulterville, IL (62237) since 1984 per multiple business directories. Located at 10516 State Route 153, Coulterville, IL 62237. IL SoS apps.ilsos.gov returned 403 to programmatic queries; bizapedia URL returned 410 Gone. No officer/president names recovered; 1984 founding from D&B/Yellow Pages.
